ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., group project, individual task) */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criteria for the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., open, closed, in review) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading criteria */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading criteria */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criteria in the overall grade */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score for the criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the criteria was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being reviewed */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade given by the reviewer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Final grade of the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Final feedback from the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the reviewer (e.g., instructor, teaching assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reviewer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the reviewer record */,
  "assigned_courses" TEXT /* Courses the reviewer is assigned to (comma-separated list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peer_review_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review metric */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being reviewed */,
  "grade" REAL /* Average grade given by reviewers */,
  "agreement_rate" REAL /* Average agreement rate among reviewers */,
  "consistency_rate" REAL /* Average consistency rate among reviewers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metrics */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the assignment */,
  "review_method" TEXT /* Method used for the peer review (e.g., pairwise, primary match) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peer_review_metrics_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pairwise_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pairwise agreement */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peer review being compared */,
  "reviewer1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first reviewer */,
  "reviewer2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second reviewer */,
  "agreement_rate" REAL /* Agreement rate between the two reviewers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the agreement was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairwise_agreements_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES peer_reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary match */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peer review being compared */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "primary_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary reviewer */,
  "match_rate" REAL /* Match rate between the reviewer and primary reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the match was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_primary_matches_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES peer_reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "at_least_one_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peer review being compared */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "other_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the other reviewer */,
  "match_rate" REAL /* Match rate between the reviewer and other reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the match was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_least_one_matches_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES peer_reviews ("review_id")
)
